name: @grikomsn/ai-sdk-provider-chatgpt-oauth
description: Vercel AI SDK v7 provider for OpenAI models through ChatGPT OAuth
author: Griko Nibras

scripts.build: tsup && cp src/codex-instructions.txt src/codex-gpt5-codex-instructions.txt src/codex-apply-patch-instructions.txt dist/
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run typecheck:examples && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build
scripts.example:basic: npm run build && npx tsx examples/basic-usage.ts
scripts.example:streaming: npm run build && npx tsx examples/streaming.ts
scripts.example:tools: npm run build && npx tsx examples/tool-calling-basic.ts
scripts.example:auth: npm run build && npx tsx examples/check-auth.ts
scripts.example:models: npm run build && npx tsx examples/model-support.ts
scripts.example:reasoning: npm run build && npx tsx examples/reasoning-effort.ts
scripts.example:basic-5-4: npm run build && npx tsx examples/basic-usage-gpt-5-4.ts
scripts.example:streaming-5-4: npm run build && npx tsx examples/streaming-gpt-5-4.ts
scripts.example:instructions-5-4: npm run build && npx tsx examples/instructions-gpt-5-4.ts
scripts.example:object-5-4: npm run build && npx tsx examples/generate-json-basic-gpt-5-4.ts
